definitions.technical: A monthly requirement under the GENIUS Act in which the chief executive officer and chief financial officer of a stablecoin issuer personally certify that the issuer's reserve composition report is accurate.
definitions.lay: A rule requiring the top two executives of a stablecoin company to personally sign off every month that their reserve report is truthful. This makes them individually accountable for the accuracy of the information.
definitions.parenthetical: (a monthly personal certification by senior executives that reserve disclosures are accurate)
definitions.legal_significance: Personal certification by named officers mirrors the approach taken by Sarbanes-Oxley Act Section 302 for public company financial statements. It creates individual liability that incentivizes accurate reserve reporting.
